message:
feat(plan): add budget monotonicity checking for rewrite validation

Add methods to verify that plan rewrites don't degrade budget guarantees:

- BudgetEffect::is_not_worse_than() - compares two budget effects to
  ensure a rewrite doesn't remove deadlines, increase min_polls, or
  unbind previously bounded max_polls

- SideConditionChecker::rewrite_preserves_budget() - validates that
  rewriting a plan preserves budget monotonicity properties

- SideConditionChecker::children_pairwise_independent() - verifies all
  children of a node are pairwise independent (useful for join analysis)

Includes tests for budget monotonicity edge cases (unbounded max_polls
rejection, tighter deadline acceptance).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
